message:
test(perf): cross-validate stage coverage counts against matrix cell data

Add observed stage attribution counting to the phase 1 matrix validator:
walk each matrix cell's stage_attribution, count non-null values per
stage key (open_ms, append_ms, save_ms, index_ms), then compare against
the reported operation_stage_coverage counts. This catches both inflated
counts (claiming more coverage than exists) and deflated counts (under-
reporting actual coverage).

Changes:
- Add HashMap to track observed non-null stage attribution per key while
  iterating matrix cells
- After iteration, verify each operation_stage_coverage count matches
  the observed count exactly
- Move expected_required_stage_keys to top of function (was duplicated)

New tests:
- phase1_matrix_validator_rejects_deflated_stage_coverage_count: verifies
  that understating index_ms coverage is caught
- phase1_matrix_validator_rejects_inflated_stage_coverage_count: verifies
  that overstating open_ms coverage is caught

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
